finding.title: OpenClaw directory not found
finding.detail: ~/.openclaw does not exist. Mantou could not find an OpenClaw installation on this machine.
finding.remediation: Install OpenClaw and run it once to generate the configuration directory.

finding.title: OpenClaw logs directory not found
finding.detail: ~/.openclaw/logs does not exist. OpenClaw may not be logging, or logs are stored elsewhere.
finding.remediation: Check OpenClaw logging configuration (logging.path). Ensure logs are retained for incident response.
